reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar. El agua caliente no se paga, cosa que si en la Axion. Y se puede descansar en la plaza que está atrás, llena de árboles y bancos

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop. Hot water is free, unlike at the Axion gas station. And you can relax in the plaza behind it, full of trees and benches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHd09uUWxnRRAB
